zh.Bishopsgate, London, England: 英國英格蘭倫敦比曉普斯蓋特
zh.Edmonton, Middlesex, England: 英國英格蘭米德萊可艾德蒙頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London於大約1315年出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親Adam Francis I37歲，母親Constance32歲。他與Agnes Champneis結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1352年被列為sheriff of essex & hertfordshire, alderman。他去世於1375年5月4日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦比曉普斯蓋特。

zh-hans.Edmonton, Middlesex, England: 英国英格兰米德萊可艾德蒙頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London于大约1315年出生在英国倫敦时，他的父亲Adam Francis I37岁，母亲Constance32岁。他与Agnes Champneis结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1352年被列为sheriff of essex & hertfordshire, alderman。他去世于1375年5月4日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦比曉普斯蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Old French personal name Franceis, modern French François, from Latin Franciscus, originally ‘Frank’, though later used to denote a Frenchman. The personal name owed much of its popularity during the Middle Ages to the fame of Saint Francis of Assisi (1181–1226), whose baptismal name was actually Giovanni but who was nicknamed Francisco because his father was absent in France at the time of his birth. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Francesco and Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian Franc , and also their derivatives, e.g. Croatian Francišković (see Francisco 4).
English: ethnic name from the Old French adjective Franceis ‘French’ (see 1 above).
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames, or an adoption of the non-Jewish surname.

variants.name: Ferenc
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Iwan, Zbigniew.
Hungarian, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Rusyn (from Slovakia and Poland), Slovenian, and Croatian: from the personal name Ferenc, a Hungarian form of Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Fraczek
meanings: Polish (Frączek): from a pet form of the personal name Franciszek, an equivalent of Latin Franciscus (see Francis ). It is found mainly in Lesser Poland.

variants.name: Chico
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Jesus, Pedro, Rafael, Bernardo, Camilo, Cirilo, Juan, Miguel, Ramona, Ruben.
Spanish: from chico ‘small, young’ (of uncertain origin, perhaps from Latin ciccum ‘trifle’), applied as a nickname for a small man, or for the younger of two bearers of the same personal name.
Portuguese: from a pet form of the personal name Francisco, a vernacular form of Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Francesco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Gabriele, Giovanni, Pasquale, Rocco, Salvatore.  Spanish Carlota, Garcia, Romana.
Italian: from the personal name Francesco (from Latin Franciscus), an equivalent of Francis .

variants.name: Di Cicco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Pasquale, Carlo, Cosmo, Giovanni, Giulio, Giuseppe, Nicola, Attilio, Benedetto, Carmela.
Italian: patronymic from a pet form of the personal name Francesco, from Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Ceccarelli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Mario, Dino, Angelo, Dante, Quinto, Sesto, Aldo, Americo, Amerigo, Arcangelo, Augusto, Aurelio, Franco, Gino, Guido, Italo, Leoncio, Renato, Roberto, Tino, Tito, Valerio.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Ceccarello, a diminutive of Cecco, itself a diminutive Francesco, from Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Di Cioccio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Cosmo, Mario, Cesidio, Dante, Guido, Salvatore, Aldo, Americo, Benito, Biagio, Domenico, Ezio, Flavio, Nunzio, Quintino, Silverio.
Italian: patronymic from a personal name of uncertain derivation,possibly a pet form of Francesco (see Francis ).

variants.name: Cillo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Americo, Aniello, Antonio, Carmine, Gianna, Giovanni, Guido, Livio, Rocco, Vito.
Italian: from a shortened pet form of Francesco (equivalent of Francis ).

variants.name: Cisco
meanings: Italian (Veneto): from the personal name Cisco, a short form of Francesco, Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).
American shortened form of the surname   Francisco   (which is in part of German and presumably also of French origin) and thus a variant of   Sisco   and   Sesco  .

variants.name: Fran
meanings: Croatian: from a short form of local equivalents of the Latin personal name Franciscus (see Francis ).
Spanish: probably an altered form of Catalan   Franc  .
Hispanic (mainly Philippines): from a short form of the Spanish personal name   Franco   or   Francisco  .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical. See Adam .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London was born about 1315, in London, England, his father, Adam Francis I, was 37 and his mother, Constance, was 32. He married Agnes Champneis. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. In 1352, his occupation is listed as sheriff of essex & hertfordshire, alderman. He died on 4 May 1375, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Bishopsgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London est né environ 1315, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, Adam Francis I, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Constance, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Champneis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. En 1352, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of essex & hertfordshire, alderman. Il est décédé le 4 mai 1375, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Bishopsgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London um 1315 in London, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Francis I 37 und seine Mutter Constance 32. Er hat Agnes Champneis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1352 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of essex & hertfordshire, alderman aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. Mai 1375 im Alter von 61 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Bishopsgate, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London è nato il circa 1315 nel London, England, il suo padre, Adam Francis I, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Constance, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Champneis. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1352, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of essex & hertfordshire, alderman. Morì il 4 maggio 1375, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Bishopsgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of Londonが約1315年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Adam Francis Iは37歳，母Constanceは32歳であった。Agnes Champneisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1352年，職業はsheriff of essex & hertfordshire, aldermanと記録されている。彼は1375年5月4日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンビショプスガトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London(이)가 대략 1315년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Francis I(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Agnes Champneis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1352년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of essex & hertfordshire, alderman이었다. 그는 1375년 5월 4일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 비숍스가트에 묻혔다.

pt.BET. 1352 - 1372: de 9 de janeiro de 1352 a 8 de janeiro de 1373
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London nasceu aproximadamente 1315, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam Francis I, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Constance, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Champneis. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1352, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of essex & hertfordshire, alderman. Ele faleceu em 4 de maio de 1375, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Bishopsgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London родился около 1315 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam Francis I было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Champneis. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. В 1352 году он работал по профессии sheriff of essex & hertfordshire, alderman. Он умер 4 мая 1375 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности бишопсгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Adam Francis Lord Mayor of London nació aproximadamente 1315, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam Francis I, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Constance, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Agnes Champneis. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1352, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of essex & hertfordshire, alderman. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1375, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Bishopsgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
